name: Toyota dealership-adjacent
description: Toyota dealership-adjacent is a place to play pickleball in Trinidad, CO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Trinidad Community Center
description: Trinidad Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Trinidad, CO. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
